title: 信息日报 2026-06-22

headline.title: 科学家发现神经元需断裂DNA才能构建大脑
headline.summary: 新生神经元在发育大脑中迁移时，需挤压通过极窄空间，这一物理过程会造成最严重的DNA双链断裂。然而，幼年大脑进化出惊人的修复能力，几乎无差错地修复损伤。
headline.title_en: Scientists discover neurons must break their DNA to build the brain
headline.summary_en: As newborn neurons migrate through the developing brain, they must squeeze through incredibly tight spaces, causing double-strand DNA breaks. Yet the young brain repairs this damage almost error-free, revealing a fundamental mechanism of brain development.
headline.original_title: Scientists discover neurons must break their DNA to build the brain
headline.reason: 这一发现颠覆了神经科学的基础认知，解释了大脑发育中的核心机制，具有重大科学价值和广泛影响力，是今天最具突破性的新闻。
headline.reason_en: This discovery overturns fundamental understanding of neuroscience, explaining a core mechanism of brain development, with profound scientific significance and broad impact, making it the most groundbreaking story today.
